name: aimhooman
description: AI works. Hoomans ship. Keeps AI session files, secrets, and unwanted attribution out at the agent and Git boundary.

interface.shortDescription: Keep AI tooling residue out of Git
interface.longDescription: Detects AI session files, secrets, and unwanted attribution before they enter Git history.
defaultPrompt: Check this repository for AI tooling artifacts.
Explain the aimhooman policy for this repository.
Audit the current Git range with aimhooman.
